Data Intelligence

Data that powers smarter decisions

Access the most comprehensive and accurate automotive data in the industry. Our solutions help you identify parts, streamline catalogues, and optimise supply chains.

Learn more
Data Intelligence

Data that powers smarter decisions

Access the most comprehensive and accurate automotive data in the industry. Our solutions help you identify parts, streamline catalogues, and optimise supply chains.

Learn more

Driving innovation for traders

We are the go-to-partner for innovative expert solutions in the global automotive aftermarket. Streamlining processes and advancing your business.

All you need to know

Secondary no borderSecondary outlineSecondary filled

TecDoc is a standardised catalogue system that provides detailed, structured information about automotive spare parts and their vehicle applications. It serves as the backbone for digital parts identification across the independent automotive aftermarket.

By connecting part manufacturers, distributors, and workshops through a common data standard, TecDoc ensures that the right parts are matched to the right vehicles — reducing returns, improving efficiency, and driving growth across the entire value chain.

TecDoc applies a rigorous, multi-stage validation process to every data record before it is published. This includes automated plausibility checks, format verification, and cross-referencing against existing vehicle and part databases.

Data suppliers must meet strict quality criteria defined by TecAlliance. Regular audits, feedback loops, and a dedicated quality management team ensure that the catalogue maintains the highest standards in the industry.

TecDoc serves a wide range of stakeholders in the automotive aftermarket. Parts manufacturers use it to distribute their catalogues globally, while wholesalers and distributors rely on it for accurate part lookups and seamless ordering.

Independent workshops and garage networks benefit from fast, reliable vehicle-to-part matching. E-commerce platforms and online retailers also leverage TecDoc data to power their product search and fitment features.

TecDoc data is updated on a monthly release cycle, ensuring that new parts, updated vehicle links, and corrections are available to all users in a timely manner. Each release undergoes thorough quality checks before publication.

In addition to the regular cycle, urgent corrections and high-priority additions can be processed outside the standard schedule, so critical data reaches the market as quickly as possible.

Yes. TecDoc data is available through well-documented APIs and standardised data formats, making integration with major e-commerce platforms straightforward. Whether you run a custom-built shop or use platforms like Shopware, Magento, or WooCommerce, the data can be connected with minimal effort.

TecAlliance also provides SDKs and integration guides to accelerate development. This allows businesses to enrich their product catalogues with accurate fitment data, images, and technical specifications without building the data infrastructure from scratch.

Any further questions?

All you need to know

TecDoc is a standardised catalogue system that provides detailed, structured information about automotive spare parts and their vehicle applications. It serves as the backbone for digital parts identification across the independent automotive aftermarket.

By connecting part manufacturers, distributors, and workshops through a common data standard, TecDoc ensures that the right parts are matched to the right vehicles — reducing returns, improving efficiency, and driving growth across the entire value chain.

TecDoc applies a rigorous, multi-stage validation process to every data record before it is published. This includes automated plausibility checks, format verification, and cross-referencing against existing vehicle and part databases.

Data suppliers must meet strict quality criteria defined by TecAlliance. Regular audits, feedback loops, and a dedicated quality management team ensure that the catalogue maintains the highest standards in the industry.

TecDoc serves a wide range of stakeholders in the automotive aftermarket. Parts manufacturers use it to distribute their catalogues globally, while wholesalers and distributors rely on it for accurate part lookups and seamless ordering.

Independent workshops and garage networks benefit from fast, reliable vehicle-to-part matching. E-commerce platforms and online retailers also leverage TecDoc data to power their product search and fitment features.

In addition to the regular cycle, urgent corrections and high-priority additions can be processed outside the standard schedule, so critical data reaches the market as quickly as possible.

Yes. TecDoc data is available through well-documented APIs and standardised data formats, making integration with major e-commerce platforms straightforward. Whether you run a custom-built shop or use platforms like Shopware, Magento, or WooCommerce, the data can be connected with minimal effort.

TecAlliance also provides SDKs and integration guides to accelerate development. This allows businesses to enrich their product catalogues with accurate fitment data, images, and technical specifications without building the data infrastructure from scratch.

Instant Data Processing (IDP) – Regular Downtimes

The new products TecDoc ONE, IDP Data Supplier API and TecDoc Data Wave for Data Suppliers as well as IDP Data Receiver API are all based on the new Instant Data Processing (IDP) Platform. This is generally available 24/7 for your data updates and data retrievals. We reserve the right to take the systems offline for approx. 30 minutes every 14 days in order to install new functions, improvements and error corrections. The schedule for these regular interruptions to availability can be found here.

Regular IDP Downtimes 2025

TecAlliance Product World

Do more with reliable, standardized data for faster part identification and smarter trading.

Make your products available in the world’s most comprehensive spare parts catalogue. Transform potential customers into buyers.

Instant access to technical repair procedures, wiring diagrams, diagnostic trouble codes, service schedules, and many more.

TecAlliance, Helping the IAM Work Together Through Unified Data (grey)

For over 30 years, the independent aftermarket has relied on a shared, neutral data foundation that keeps cataloguing, trading, and service processes aligned across partners and markets.

  • Trusted IAM Data Leader

    Accurate, validated data reduces mismatches and ensures correct part identification.

  • Global Standards That Connect Partners

    Harmonized cataloguing, ordering, and returns processes eliminate friction.

  • Expertise That Supports Daily Work

    Decades of IAM knowledge help teams operate efficiently and scale with confidence.

Story – How we became TecAlliance

1994

Company founded in Germany

In 1994 the TechAlliance was founded by Marc Mustermann and Average Joe in the city of . From its early beginnings, the company focused on improving data quality and transparency across the industry. Over time, TecAlliance grew into a global organization, expanding its solutions and reach to support manufacturers, distributors, and workshops worldwide. Today, TecAlliance is recognized as a key industry partner, driving digitalization and data-driven collaboration across the aftermarket.

2002

First international expansion

In 2002, TecAlliance took its first major step onto the international stage by opening offices in France and Italy. This expansion marked a turning point for the company, allowing it to serve a growing network of European aftermarket partners directly. With dedicated local teams, TecAlliance strengthened relationships with parts manufacturers and distributors across new markets, laying the groundwork for a truly pan-European data infrastructure.

2004

Launch of the TecDoc catalogue

The year 2004 saw the launch of the next-generation TecDoc catalogue platform, a milestone that revolutionized how the automotive aftermarket accessed and managed parts data. For the first time, workshops and distributors could search, compare, and order parts through a unified digital system. This innovation dramatically reduced errors in parts identification and set a new standard for data-driven commerce in the automotive industry.

2011

Global reach with partners worldwide

By 2011, TecAlliance had established partnerships spanning over 30 countries across Europe, Asia, and the Americas. The company's data solutions were now integral to the operations of major automotive brands, tier-one suppliers, and thousands of independent workshops. This global network enabled seamless cross-border collaboration and cemented TecAlliance's role as the backbone of aftermarket data standardization worldwide.

2015

Cloud-based platform transformation

In 2015, TecAlliance embarked on a comprehensive cloud transformation, migrating its core catalogue and order management systems to a modern cloud infrastructure. This shift enabled real-time data synchronization, faster updates, and significantly improved reliability for all connected partners. The move to the cloud also unlocked powerful analytics capabilities, giving customers deeper insights into market trends, parts demand, and supply chain efficiency.

2020

Accelerating digital aftermarket solutions

The challenges of 2020 accelerated the digital transformation of the entire automotive aftermarket. TecAlliance responded by launching new API-first services and expanding its e-commerce integration tools, helping partners adapt to rapidly changing customer expectations. With remote workshops and contactless ordering becoming the norm, TecAlliance's digital ecosystem proved essential for keeping the aftermarket supply chain running smoothly during unprecedented times.

2024

AI-powered data intelligence

In 2024, TecAlliance introduced its AI-powered data intelligence suite, leveraging machine learning to automate parts classification, detect data anomalies, and predict demand patterns. These capabilities transformed how manufacturers and distributors managed their catalogues. The AI platform reduced manual data entry by over 60% and enabled partners to bring new parts to market faster than ever before, setting a new benchmark for efficiency in the automotive aftermarket.

2025

Shaping the future of mobility data

As TecAlliance enters 2025, the company is pioneering the next generation of mobility data services. With a focus on electric vehicles, connected car ecosystems, and sustainable supply chains, TecAlliance is expanding its platform to meet the demands of a rapidly evolving automotive landscape. By connecting over 900 data suppliers with more than 500,000 workshops globally, TecAlliance continues to drive the digital transformation of the aftermarket — ensuring that the right parts reach the right place at the right time.
